title: [SSP] Add `-ssp-schedule` pass with initial support for the simplex schedulers.
body:
Add a pass to schedule all SSP instances in the input module. To keep the PR small, only the simplex schedulers are currently supported. The other algorithms will be added in a follow-up PR.

The approach fully reconstructs the SSP IR after scheduling. This is not strictly necessary, and it should be possible and more efficient to only add the attributes for the respective solution properties. However, for this initial version of the pass, I wanted to keep things as simple as possible.

~~Note that this PR includes the changes proposed in #4363; the diff will clear up once that lands.~~
